pageText: Helpful answers for production teams, costume departments and businesses requesting embroidery work.

items.question: Do you work with film, TV and theater productions?
items.answer: Yes. Backlot Embroidery Co. is built for production wardrobe, prop, event and theater needs.

items.question: Can you handle rush orders?
items.answer: Rush availability depends on quantity, artwork readiness and current production load. Use the quote form and include your deadline.

items.question: Can I upload artwork for a quote?
items.answer: Yes. The quote form can use Jotform and supports artwork uploads.

items.question: Do you digitize logos?
items.answer: Yes. We can prepare embroidery-ready files from clean artwork or existing production references.
